title: Light Golden Apples Datapack
description: A small datapack that makes the crafting recipe of golden apples cheaper for more affordable pvp
body:
## Cheap Golden Apples
A simple datapack that makes the golden apple recipe more affordable to craft, for easier grinding.

![gapp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74c8296824122b2963598ec3a2f7cc14a5a71385.png)
